assertions.title: Manual unblock fully clears stale issue ownership

steps.action: Review the pre-unblock issue detail transcript for STA-3.
steps.expected: The stale issue should still show execution ownership before recovery.
steps.observed: The issue was blocked with `checkoutRunId` and `executionRunId` both set to `a297d15f-6eae-433c-8df5-5938edbbbbbf`, plus `activeRunId` on the same run and `activeLeaseId` `e0f3cccf-846c-4e24-8b8e-e602ca775d3d`.

steps.expected: Manual unblock should clear stale execution ownership and reject stale queued work.
steps.observed: The unblock response returned `issue.status="todo"`, `leaseReleased=true`, `rejectedIntents=1`, and recovery metadata showing `clearedExecutionRunId` and `clearedCheckoutRunId` for run `a297d15f-6eae-433c-8df5-5938edbbbbbf`.

steps.action: Review the immediate follow-up issue detail transcript after unblock.
steps.expected: The issue should remain clear of execution ownership with no rebound on the immediate reread.
steps.observed: The follow-up issue detail kept `checkoutRunId=null`, `executionRunId=null`, `activeRunId=null`, and `activeLeaseId=null`, with `projectedStatus="todo"` and no rebound of the recovered run.

evidence.consoleErrors: not applicable (API synthesis from saved curl transcripts)

assertions.title: Recovery converges across status surfaces after cleanup

steps.action: Review the pre-recovery active-run, live-runs, status, and stale-inventory transcripts for the recovered run.
steps.expected: Before recovery, the target run should still appear as active/queued work somewhere in the status surfaces.
steps.observed: Before unblock, run `a297d15f-6eae-433c-8df5-5938edbbbbbf` showed `status="running"`, company live-runs listed it alongside unrelated run `79107ab9-794e-449e-b25f-404916a7ceba`, company status reported `totalActiveRuns=2` and `totalQueuedIntents=1`, and stale inventory still exposed queued intent `6560af2b-ad9f-43b2-96ee-fa8a7d60eca3`.

steps.action: Review the post-recovery issue detail and active-run transcripts for STA-3.
steps.expected: After recovery, the affected issue should be non-running and the recovered run should no longer present as active work.
steps.observed: The post-unblock issue detail showed `projectedStatus="todo"` with `activeRunId=null`, and the saved post-recovery active-run transcript for run `a297d15f-6eae-433c-8df5-5938edbbbbbf` was `null`.

steps.action: Review the post-recovery live-runs, company status, and stale-inventory transcripts.
steps.expected: Status surfaces should stop exposing the recovered run as active or queued work, while unrelated work may remain.
steps.observed: After recovery, company live-runs and company status removed run `a297d15f-6eae-433c-8df5-5938edbbbbbf` from `activeRuns`, `recentRuns` recorded it as `cancelled`, `totalQueuedIntents` dropped to `0`, and stale inventory retained only unrelated orphan run `79107ab9-794e-449e-b25f-404916a7ceba`.

evidence.consoleErrors: not applicable (API synthesis from saved curl transcripts)

summary: Tested 2 assertions from saved fresh rerun evidence: VAL-STALE-003 passed because manual unblock cleared both stale ownership ids with no immediate rebound, and VAL-STALE-008 passed because the recovered issue became non-running and company status surfaces no longer exposed its run as active or queued work, while an unrelated orphan run remained visible.
